sections.title: Test Coverage Analysis: New Chapter Real Estate CRM
Current State Summary
sections.content:
**No test framework is installed.** The `package.json` has no test runner (Jest, Vitest, etc.) and no project-specific tests exist. Only `node_modules/` test files were found.

---

sections.title: Critical Finding: No Test Infrastructure
sections.content: The project needs a testing framework before any meaningful coverage can be achieved.

sections.title: Recommended Setup
sections.content:
```bash
npm install -D vitest @vitest/coverage-v8 @testing-library/react @testing-library/jest-dom msw
```

---

sections.title: Gap #1: Utility Functions — No Edge Case Coverage
File: `src/lib/utils.ts`
Gap #2: Permission Functions — No Role Coverage
File: `src/lib/permissions.ts`
Gap #3: API Routes — No HTTP Layer Tests
Auth Endpoints
Property Endpoints — Massive Gap
Sub-resource Endpoints — No Coverage
Gap #4: CSV Injection Prevention — Untested
File: `src/app/api/properties/export/route.ts`
Gap #5: Error Handling — Not Tested
Gap #6: Auth Rate Limiter — Logic Never Tested
File: `src/lib/auth.ts`
Gap #7: Integration Test Flows — Completely Missing
sections.content:
No end-to-end scenarios tested:

| Flow | Description |
|------|-------------|
| **Full property lifecycle** | Create → GET → PATCH status → add contact → add note → add photo → delete |
| **CSV import pipeline** | Import 100 properties → verify count → check normalization |
| **User management** | Create user → reset password → verify temp password works → login |
| **Permission boundaries** | VIEWER tries to create property (403), POWER_USER creates (201), ADMIN deletes (201) |
| **Backup integrity** | Export backup → verify all 8 models present |

---
